ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kilo-Org/kilocode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode
Language: typescript
Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Kong/insomnia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Kong/insomnia
Language: typescript
The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat
Language: typescript
The Secure CommsOS™ for mission-critical operations

URL: https://github.com/continuedev/continue
Language: typescript
open-source coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cypress-io/cypress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cypress-io/cypress

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp

freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ibelick/ui-skills

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/likec4/likec4
Language: typescript
Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meshery/meshery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meshery/meshery
Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nocobase/nocobase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase
Language: typescript
NocoBase is an open-source AI + no-code platform for building business systems fast. Instead of generating everything from scratch, AI works on top of production-proven infrastructure and a WYSIWYG no-code interface, so you get both speed and reliability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: puppeteer/puppeteer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/puppeteer/puppeteer
Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tinacms/tinacms
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tinacms/tinacms
